seoDescription: About Jefferson's Timber Floors — Melbourne's timber flooring specialists. Engineered flooring, installations, and subfloor preparation.
title: Craftsmanship you can trust
intro: Jefferson's Timber Floors has been installing and restoring timber flooring across Melbourne for over 20 years. We combine old-school attention to detail with modern equipment and finishes.
body:
Every floor tells a story. Whether it's engineered timber in a new Fitzroy build or a full installation across a Mornington Peninsula home, we treat every project with the care it deserves.

We're known for dustless installation, precise finishes, and results that stand up to Australian conditions. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and committed to leaving your property cleaner than we found it.

From a single room installation to a full home project, we bring the same level of craftsmanship to every job. That's why Melbourne homeowners and businesses keep coming back.
